A 0.1-mm-thick aluminum foil screen with a

Sample mass was determined by measure alpha-activity

90 mm.  Cd filter of 0.5 mm thickness - for recycled
counters in cylindrical chamber of 30 cm diameter,
2 mm side-wall thickness, filled with isobutane at
8 mbar pressure - for fission fragments detection.
